description: scaffold a Codex plugin dir + .codex-plugin/plugin.json (+ optional folders/stubs), local-only
rules: always creates .codex-plugin/plugin.json with the full placeholder manifest
PLUGIN_NAME is normalized to lower hyphen-case and must be <= 64 chars
a listing of the created tree is written to record_store
usage: Set PLUGIN_NAME (the plugin name). Optionally set PLUGIN_PARENT (parent dir; defaults to record_store). Output: scaffold.json.
limitation: Does not touch the shared marketplace.json (use the marketplace perk). Creates optional folders/stubs only when their flags are wired; the core defaults to the manifest plus base folder.
